questions.question:
A DaemonSet diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe rollout guidance.

A ConfigMap named `daemonset-rollout-brief` already exists in namespace `daemonset-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDaemonSet` is `log-agent`
- `daemonSetInventory` is `kubectl get daemonset log-agent -n daemonset-lab -o wide`
- `rolloutStatusCheck` is `kubectl rollout status daemonset/log-agent -n daemonset-lab --timeout=180s`
- `nodeInventory` is `kubectl get nodes -o wide`
- `nodeCoverageCheck` is `kubectl get pods -n daemonset-lab -l app=log-agent -o wide`
- `updateStrategyCheck` is `kubectl get daemonset log-agent -n daemonset-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.updateStrategy.type}'`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm desiredNumberScheduled matches running pods before changing DaemonSet manifests`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1001/daemonset-rollout-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1001/daemonset-rollout-checklist.txt` with the sections `DaemonSet Inventory`, `Node Coverage`, and `Safe Rollout Review`

Do not delete the DaemonSet, do not cordon nodes, and do not convert the workload into a Deployment during this drill.

verification.description: The DaemonSet diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, rollout status check, node inventory, node coverage, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact DaemonSet inventory, node coverage, and safe rollout review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe DaemonSet remediation guidance is removed
